creator: jcwells@u.washington.edu
text:
On Tue, 30 Mar 1999, Tom Hukins wrote:

>This PR seems to have been superceded by ports/10469 which contains
>a port for linux-netscape-4.51. Should this PR be closed?

Yep. Close away.
